title: Make station actions functional
instructions: The C++ BSStationWidget already has action population logic. Check: 1) grep for PopulateActions/ShowActions/GetAvailableActions in BSStationWidget.cpp and BSStationBase.cpp. 2) Check if actions.csv is loaded by BSDataSubsystem. 3) Wire the station widget to call the C++ action list when opened. 4) The player should see a list of available actions (Degrease, Steam Clean, etc.) in the station UI panel when pressing E at a station. 5) Use simulate_walk_to + simulate_input + capture_full_screen to verify. 6) Git commit when working.

steps: verify action list visible in station UI
verification.success_criteria: Station UI shows available actions from actions.csv

constraints: Do NOT modify any widget not in Arcwright manifest
Report honestly - do not say PASS without screenshot evidence
